# DevStarter — Consultation Intake (Auto-generated)

> **Auto-generated by /devstarter-consult**
> This file captures the consultation context so it can be passed directly
> to `/devstarter-change` without re-entering requirements.
>
> To implement: `/devstarter-change memory/consult-[YYYY-MM-DD]-[slug].md`
> Claude will skip the intake questions and jump straight to Impact Analysis.

---

> **Instructions for Claude (when reading this file in /devstarter-change):**
> - Detect change type from `change_type` field below
> - Pre-populate all intake fields from this file
> - Skip C-Q1 through C-Q6 (or A-Q1 through A-Q8) entirely
> - Show INTAKE SUMMARY pre-filled, wait for approval
> - After approval → jump directly to Impact Analysis (A-PHASE 2 or C-PHASE 2)

---

## CONSULTATION HANDOFF

```
change_type: [Add Feature / Modify Feature / Fix Bug]
feature_name: [short name or slug]
date: [YYYY-MM-DD]
advisor: [@agent1, @agent2]
```

---

### Section 1 — Problem / Request

**What the user described:**
```
[paste the user's original question or paste verbatim]
```

**Change type detected:**
- [ ] Add Feature — new capability that doesn't exist yet
- [ ] Modify Feature — change how an existing feature works
- [ ] Fix Bug — something is broken and needs to be corrected

---

### Section 2 — Analysis Summary

**Situation understood:**
```
[brief summary of the current state from the consultation]
```

**Root cause (for bugs) / Gap (for features):**
```
[what is wrong or missing — "unknown" if not yet determined]
```

**Affected area / files (if identified):**
```
- [file or module]
- [file or module]
```

---

### Section 3 — Recommended Approach

**Recommended option from consultation:**
```
[Option X — name and brief description]
```

**Why this was recommended:**
```
[reason tailored to project context]
```

**Estimated effort:** [S (< 2h) / M (2–8h) / L (8–24h) / XL (> 24h)]

**Risks or caveats:**
```
- [risk 1 or "none identified"]
```

---

### Section 4 — Acceptance Criteria

**Done when:**
```
Given [precondition]
When  [action or trigger]
Then  [expected result]
```

**Regression guard (must still work):**
```
-
-
```

---

## INTAKE SUMMARY (Claude fills this before handing off to /devstarter-change)

```
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📋 CONSULTATION HANDOFF SUMMARY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Type:        [Add Feature / Modify Feature / Fix Bug]
Feature:     [name]
Advisor:     [@agent]
Date:        [YYYY-MM-DD]

Problem:
  [one-line description of what the user described]

Root cause / Gap:
  [what needs to be addressed]

Recommended:
  [Option X — description]
  Effort: [S/M/L/XL]

Acceptance criteria:
  Given [X] → When [Y] → Then [Z]

Saved to: memory/consult-[YYYY-MM-DD]-[slug].md

  "approve"        → launch /devstarter-change (skip intake, go to analysis)
  "revise [notes]" → update any section above
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
```
